queries.question: For each streaming service, what is the corresponding social media integration description?
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , social_media_integrations.description from Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations join Social_Media_Integrations on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id = Social_Media_Integrations.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations a :Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations .
  ?social_media_integrations a :Social_Media_Integrations .
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations p:hasSocial_Media_Integrations ?social_media_integrations .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?social_media_integrations p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For every streaming service, show me the corresponding integration types of social media integrations.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , social_media_integrations.integration_type from Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations join Social_Media_Integrations on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id = Social_Media_Integrations.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?integration_type WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations a :Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations .
  ?social_media_integrations a :Social_Media_Integrations .
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations p:hasSocial_Media_Integrations ?social_media_integrations .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?social_media_integrations p:integration_type ?integration_type .
}

queries.question: For every streaming service, list the types and descriptions of social media integration.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , social_media_integrations.integration_type , social_media_integrations.description from Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations join Social_Media_Integrations on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id = Social_Media_Integrations.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?integration_type ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations a :Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations .
  ?social_media_integrations a :Social_Media_Integrations .
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations p:hasSocial_Media_Integrations ?social_media_integrations .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_social_media_integrations p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?social_media_integrations p:integration_type ?integration_type .
  ?social_media_integrations p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What is the social media integration description for each streaming service?
queries.sql: SELECT Social_Media_Integrations.description  from Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations join Social_Media_Integrations on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id = Social_Media_Integrations.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the types and descriptions of social media each streaming service integrates.
queries.sql: SELECT Social_Media_Integrations.integration_type, Social_Media_Integrations.description  from Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations join Social_Media_Integrations on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id = Social_Media_Integrations.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: which types of social media integrations are associated with each streaming service?
queries.sql: SELECT Social_Media_Integrations.integration_type  from Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations join Social_Media_Integrations on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id = Social_Media_Integrations.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.social_media_integration_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Social_Media_Integrations.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the social media integration description for each streaming service?
which types of social media integrations are associated with each streaming service?
Give me the types and descriptions of social media each streaming service integrates.
